input_text: The bicycle was repaired by Anna. Elephants have either trunks or tails. Emily is a wolf. The street is in Tallinn. Gertrude is a cat. The rain continued. The glass was broken by the boy. The city was destroyed. Ellen is fond of John. Mary visited London in September. Sandra went back to the bathroom. The woman holding a heavy lamp sang. The nice Emajogi is 80 kilometers long. The road leading to the village was narrow. Muggles can not disappear. All the boxes are red except for the small one. Unexpectedly, the door opened. Who is Ellen afraid of?
